info.title: ZakOps API
info.description:
# ZakOps Deal Lifecycle OS API

Backend services for the ZakOps autonomous deal management platform.

## Overview

ZakOps provides AI-powered deal lifecycle management with:
- **Deal Management** — Create, track, and manage deals through their lifecycle
- **Agent Actions** — AI-generated actions with human-in-the-loop approval
- **Document Storage** — Secure artifact storage with cloud support
- **Real-time Events** — SSE streaming for live updates

## Authentication

Authentication is session-based using cookies.

```bash
# Login
curl -X POST /api/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"email": "user@example.com", "password": "secret"}' \
  -c cookies.txt

# Use session
curl /api/deals -b cookies.txt
```

In development mode (`AUTH_REQUIRED=false`), authentication is optional.

## Response Format

### Success Response
```json
{
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "trace_id": "abc-123",
    "correlation_id": "deal-456",
    "timestamp": "2026-01-19T12:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

### Error Response
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "NOT_FOUND",
    "message": "Deal not found",
    "details": null
  },
  "meta": {
    "trace_id": "abc-123",
    "timestamp": "2026-01-19T12:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

## Tracing

Include these headers for distributed tracing:
- `X-Trace-ID` — Unique request identifier (auto-generated if not provided)
- `X-Correlation-ID` — Business correlation ID (e.g., deal_id)

## Error Codes

| Code | HTTP Status | Description |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| `BAD_REQUEST` | 400 | Invalid request format |
| `VALIDATION_ERROR` | 422 | Request validation failed |
| `UNAUTHORIZED` | 401 | Authentication required |
| `FORBIDDEN` | 403 | Permission denied |
| `NOT_FOUND` | 404 | Resource not found |
| `CONFLICT` | 409 | Resource conflict |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | Server error |

## Rate Limiting

Rate limiting is not currently enforced but may be added in future versions.

## Webhooks

Webhook support is planned for future releases.

post.description:
Login with email and password.

Returns operator info and sets session cookie.
Logout and invalidate session.

get.description: Get the current authenticated operator.

post.description:
Register a new operator.

Note: In production, this should be admin-only or disabled.

get.description:
Check if the current session is authenticated.

Returns authentication status without requiring auth.

Basic health check.

Returns 200 if the service is running.

Kubernetes liveness probe.

Returns 200 if the process is alive.
Used by k8s to determine if the container should be restarted.

schema.title: Response Liveness Check Health Live Get

get.description:
Kubernetes readiness probe.

Returns 200 if the service is ready to accept traffic.
Checks database connectivity and other dependencies.

schema.title: Response Readiness Check Health Ready Get

get.description:
Kubernetes startup probe.

Returns 200 if the service has completed initialization.
Used by k8s to determine when the container is ready to receive probes.

schema.title: Response Startup Check Health Startup Get

get.description:
Get build version information.

Returns version, git commit, and build time for deployment verification.

schema.title: Response Get Version Api Version Get

get.description:
Detailed health check with system information.

Note: Should be protected in production.

schema.title: Response Detailed Health Check Health Detailed Get

post.description:
Invoke the agent for a deal.

The agent will:
1. Analyze the deal based on the task
2. Execute relevant tools
3. Create actions for human review

Events are emitted in real-time via SSE.

get.description: List agent runs with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Agent Runs Api Agent Runs Get

get.description: Get details of a specific agent run.

schema.title: Response Get Agent Run Api Agent Runs  Run Id  Get

get.description: List all available tools for agent execution.

schema.title: Response List Available Tools Api Agent Tools Get

post.description:
Invoke the LangSmith-powered AI agent with a task.

The agent uses Claude models with automatic fallback and tracing:
- Primary model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
- Fallback model: claude-haiku-4-20250514

Task types:
- tool_orchestration: Full agent with tools (default)
- document_analysis: Document-focused analysis
- deal_insights: Deal-specific recommendations
- quick_response: Fast, cost-effective responses
- summarization: Content summarization

Invoke the LangSmith agent with streaming response.

Returns Server-Sent Events (SSE) with tokens as they are generated.

get.description:
List available models for agent execution.

Returns models with their capabilities, costs, and current configuration.

Check LangSmith agent health and configuration.

Returns:
- Model registry configuration
- Tool count
- LangSmith tracing status
List Dead Letter Queue entries.
Get DLQ statistics.

post.description: Retry a specific DLQ entry.
Retry all DLQ entries.
Purge DLQ entries older than specified days.

get.description: Get outbox queue statistics.
Get SSE connection statistics.
Get comprehensive system health status.
Get valid stage transitions for a deal.

post.description:
Transition a deal to a new stage.

Idempotency:
    Provide X-Idempotency-Key header or idempotency_key in body.
    Same key within 24 hours returns the original result without changes.

Returns:
    TransitionResponse with idempotent_hit=true if cached.

get.description: Get stage transition history for a deal.
Get count of deals in each stage.

Search deals by name, company, or content with cursor-based pagination.

Cursor pagination ensures stable results even when data changes between requests.
Use the next_cursor from the response in subsequent requests to get the next page.

Example:
    # First request
    GET /api/search/deals?q=acme&limit=10

    # Next page (use next_cursor from response)
    GET /api/search/deals?q=acme&limit=10&cursor=eyJpZCI6...
Search actions with cursor-based pagination.

Search across all entity types.

Returns top results from deals and actions without pagination
(use specific endpoints for paginated results).

Get unified activity timeline for a deal.

Includes:
- Stage changes
- Actions (created, approved, completed)
- Agent runs
- Events

parameters.name: activity_type

schema.description: Filter by type: stage_change, action, agent_run, event
schema.title: Activity Type

parameters.description: Filter by type: stage_change, action, agent_run, event

get.description: Get activity summary counts for a deal.

Get Gmail OAuth authorization URL.

Initiates the OAuth flow by generating an authorization URL
that the user should be redirected to.

Handle Gmail OAuth callback.

Exchanges the authorization code for tokens and saves the account.
List all connected email accounts for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Email Accounts Api Integrations Email Accounts Get

post.description:
Send an email.

Sends an email through the specified account and optionally links
the thread to a deal.

get.description: Get inbox messages for an email account.
Get an email thread with all messages.

post.description: Search emails with query parameters.

get.description: Get all email threads linked to a deal.

post.description: Manually link an email thread to a deal.

delete.description: Remove deal link from a thread.

post.description:
Execute an approved chat proposal.

Proposals are generated by the chat orchestrator during conversation.
This endpoint approves or rejects them, triggering the corresponding
backend action (stage transition, note creation, action creation, etc.).

Returns 501 until the chat orchestrator is fully wired.

get.description: Get chat session history.

Server-Sent Events stream for real-time updates.

STATUS: Not implemented. Returns 501.
Real-time push is planned but not yet operational.
Use polling on /api/events for now.

parameters.name: last_event_id

schema.description: Last received event ID for replay
schema.title: Last Event Id

parameters.description: Last received event ID for replay

get.description: Get SSE manager statistics.

List recent events.

Returns events from the replay buffer, filtered by correlation_id and/or event_type.

post.description:
Manually broadcast an event (admin/testing only).

This endpoint is for testing SSE functionality.
In production, events should be published through the event system.

get.description: List available action capabilities. Not yet implemented.
Get action performance metrics. Not yet implemented.
List all deals with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Deals Api Deals Get

post.description: Create a new deal.

get.description:
Look up a deal by its alias (e.g., gmail_message_id).

Returns the deal if found, or 404 if no mapping exists.
This endpoint is used by executors to check for existing email->deal mappings.
Get a single deal by ID.
Get event history for a deal.

schema.title: Response Get Deal Events Api Deals  Deal Id  Events Get

get.description: Get aliases for a deal.

post.description:
Add an alias to a deal (e.g., gmail_message_id for email mapping).

This is used by executors to create email-to-deal mappings.
If the alias already exists for this deal, returns 200 (idempotent).
If the alias exists for a different deal, returns 409 (conflict).
Add a note to a deal's event history.
Archive a deal by moving it to archived stage.
Restore a deal from archived status to a specified stage.

get.description: List actions with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Actions Api Actions Get

get.description: Get a single action by ID.

post.description: Approve a pending action.
Reject a pending action.

get.description: List quarantine items.

schema.title: Response List Quarantine Api Quarantine Get

post.description:
Create a quarantine item from the email ingestion pipeline.

This is the bridge endpoint for REMEDIATION-001 (decision 5C):
email_ingestion pipeline calls this to insert emails into quarantine
instead of writing to a local JSON/SQLite file.

get.description: Get a single quarantine item.

post.description: Process a quarantine item (approve or reject).

get.description: Get pipeline summary with deal counts per stage.

schema.title: Response Get Pipeline Summary Api Pipeline Summary Get

get.description: Get overall pipeline statistics.
List all pending tool approvals across all threads.
List sender profiles.
Get a sender profile by email.
